summary: Comprehensive testing of Brand Portal Slice 4 enhancements. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed via Playwright. Features verified: (1) Fabric card images clickable to detail, (2) Sample orders capped at 5m per line (backend 400 + frontend input cap), (3) Full shopping cart with sample/bulk sections + shipping form + order summary, (4) CTAs renamed to 'Order Bulk' and 'Request Sample', (5) Admin sample-credit OTP flow working, (6) Checkout has shipping address section, (7) Support footer with email/phone/hours, (8) Brand login includes brand_logo_url + designation + brand_name.

issues: Some fabric card images show 'Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval' alt text instead of actual image - this is expected for test data

passed_tests: GET /api/brand/support returns email, phone, hours, escalation_email
POST /api/brand/login includes brand_logo_url, designation, brand_name in user payload
POST /api/brand/orders with sample qty > 5 returns 400 with '5 meters per line' message
POST /api/brand/orders with sample qty = 5 proceeds to credit check (not qty cap error)
GET /api/admin/brands/{id} returns brand detail with users
frontend_tests_passed: Brand login redirects to /brand/fabrics
Header has cart icon with badge
Header has wallet icon linking to /brand/account
Header shows brand name and designation
Support footer shows email (support@locofast.com) and phone (+91 120 4938200)
Fabric cards have 'Order Bulk' buttons (not 'Book Bulk Now')
Fabric cards have 'Request Sample' buttons (not 'Book Sample')
Fabric card images are clickable links to detail page (data-testid='brand-fabric-card-link-{id}')
Detail page shows 'Add Bulk Order to Cart' or 'Add Sample to Cart' CTA
Detail page sample type shows 'Max 5m' badge
Detail page qty input caps at 5 when sample type selected (entered 10, shows 5)
Add to Cart increments cart badge
/brand/cart shows sample section with 'Max 5m per line' badge
/brand/cart has shipping address form (name, phone, address, city, state, pincode, notes)
/brand/cart has 'Save as default' checkbox
/brand/cart has order summary with sample + bulk totals + grand total
/brand/cart qty input caps at 5 for sample lines
/brand/cart shows 'Place Order' button
Admin Brands page shows brand list with Manage buttons
Admin brand detail panel has Credit Lines section with OTP flow
Admin brand detail panel has Sample Credits section with OTP flow
Admin sample OTP flow: clicking OTP button shows OTP input + Confirm button
No 'Credit & Samples' primary nav item (replaced by wallet icon)
critical_code_review_comments: BrandCartContext.js properly caps sample qty at 5 on addLine and updateQty
brand_router.py correctly validates sample qty > 5 returns 400 with clear message
Sample credit OTP flow properly validates: otp_request_id, otp_code, delta match, expiry, consumed status
Email fanout in _notify_order_recipients is fire-and-forget (asyncio.create_task) so slow Resend doesn't block checkout
BrandLayout.js correctly removed 'Credit & Samples' nav, replaced with wallet icon
Support footer fetches from /api/brand/support endpoint (not hardcoded)
BrandFabrics.js card images wrapped in <Link> with data-testid for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Test Brand Co with pre-seeded credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Portal Slice 4 fully tested. Cart functionality works with localStorage persistence. Sample orders capped at 5m per line (both frontend and backend). Admin sample credit adjustment requires OTP verification. Support footer shows contact info from /api/brand/support. Email fanout on order placement is async and doesn't block checkout. The brand user 'brandtest@locofast.com' has 192 sample credits available (after test adjustments) and ₹3.86L bulk credit available.
